issues.message: Per-sequence tracking files are not embedded in the core snapshot; aggregate rows retain the original published measurement contract.
Detector, SportsMOT tracker, IDSW, and route-runtime tables were validated from the immutable published core benchmark snapshot.
Semantic A/B/C reference GT covers 20 selected tracks from one 30-second UA-DETRAC traffic sequence.
Route-to-route timings use a shared 120-frame local file. Physical camera timing is reported separately with three repeated 900-frame runs per profile.
Equivalent A/B/C semantic experiments are still required on independently reviewed sports, medical, and education tracks.
IDSW categories are diagnostic heuristics, not official TrackEval metrics.
